anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps instance refinement for the shared public-runtime-organ-standard triad to durable work-landing evidence because bounded corrections must be tied to source refs, receipts, manifests, scoped commits, and explicit authority ceilings rather than status-board prose.

This markdown maps instance refinement for the shared public-runtime-organ-standard triad to durable work-landing evidence because bounded corrections must be tied to source refs, receipts, manifests, scoped commits, and explicit authority ceilings rather than status-board prose.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps instance refinement for the shared public-runtime-organ-standard triad to durable work-landing evidence because bounded corrections must be tied to source refs, receipts, manifests, scoped commits, and explicit authority ceilings rather than status-board prose.

statement: Microcosm Public Runtime Organ Standard Refine Instance
title: Microcosm Public Runtime Organ Standard Refine Instance
triggers: A public runtime organ standard has stale or weak source refs, validator refs, receipt refs, source-module manifest evidence, paper-module capsule binding, mechanism binding, authority ceiling, or anti-claim language.

The correction can be sourced from standards-meta diagnostics, durable work-landing evidence, exact-copy/source-module manifests, focused validator receipts, and generated lattice health without changing the class standard itself.
workflow: Inspect the target standard JSON, standards registry row, source-module manifest, paper-module capsule, mechanism source, validator receipts, generated health, and any landing/receipt evidence before mutation.
Change only fields that tighten source evidence, receipt expectations, validator binding, public/private boundary, authority ceiling, or anti-claim wording.
Regenerate the lattice and leave unsupported runtime correctness, release, provider, private-equivalence, source-body, or projection-freshness claims as typed residual pressure.
